word: G1631 - ἐκφύω - ekphýō - ek-foo'-o - Put forth

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐκφύω

- Transliteration: Ekphuo

- Phonetic: ek-foo'-o

- Definition:

1. to generate or produce from

2. to cause to grow out

- Origin: from G1537 and G5453

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G5453; to sprout up: - put forth.
